sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, name VARCHAR(50), value INT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG(name || ' has value: ' || COALESCE(value, 0)) FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(value) > 0;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG((SELECT name FROM test_table AS t WHERE t.value IS NOT NULL AND t.id = test_table.id)) FROM test_table GROUP BY created_at HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG((id || ' ' || COALESCE(name, 'Unknown')) || ' is available') FROM test_table WHERE value > 150 GROUP BY created_at ORDER BY created_at;
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG(NULLIF(name, '')) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2;

SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG((SELECT name FROM (SELECT DISTINCT name FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS sub)) FROM test_table CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM test_table) AS cn;
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, description) VALUES (1, 'First'), (2, NULL), (3, 'Third'), (NULL, 'Fourth');
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG(description || ' (id: ' || ref_id || ')') FROM another_table WHERE ref_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ref_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
